title: Renewable Energy ROI Calculator
description: Industrial-grade ROI calculator for renewable energy investments, incorporating ISO 50001, Lean, and Six Sigma principles for energy efficiency and financial analysis.

inputs.label: System Capacity (kW)
inputs.businessContext: Total installed capacity of the renewable energy system (solar, wind, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total installed capacity of the renewable energy system (solar, wind, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yenilenebilir enerji sisteminin (güneş, rüzgar vb.) toplam kurulu kapasitesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtinstallierte Kapazität des erneuerbaren Energiesystems (Solar, Wind usw.)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité totale installée du système d'énergie renouvelable (solaire, éolien, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad total instalada del sistema de energía renovable (solar, eólica, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي السعة المركبة لنظام الطاقة المتجددة (شمسي، رياح، إلخ).

inputs.label: Annual Energy Output (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual electricity generation based on location, technology, and degradation factors

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual electricity generation based on location, technology, and degradation factors
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konum, teknoloji ve bozulma faktörlerine bağlı beklenen yıllık elektrik üretimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Stromerzeugung basierend auf Standort, Technologie und Degradationsfaktoren
businessContext_i18n.fr: Production annuelle d'électricité attendue basée sur l'emplacement, la technologie et les facteurs de dégradation
businessContext_i18n.es: Generación eléctrica anual esperada según ubicación, tecnología y factores de degradación
businessContext_i18n.ar: توليد الكهرباء السنوي المتوقع بناءً على الموقع والتقنية وعوامل التدهور.

inputs.label: Total Capital Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront investment including equipment, installation, permits, and commissioning

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront investment including equipment, installation, permits, and commissioning
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipman, kurulum, izinler ve devreye alma dahil toplam başlangıç yatırımı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Anfangsinvestition einschließlich Ausrüstung, Installation, Genehmigungen und Inbetriebnahme
businessContext_i18n.fr: Investissement initial total incluant équipement, installation, permis et mise en service
businessContext_i18n.es: Inversión inicial total que incluye equipos, instalación, permisos y puesta en marcha
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الاستثمار المبدئي بما في ذلك المعدات والتركيب والتصاريح والتشغيل.

inputs.label: Annual Operating & Maintenance Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Recurring costs for maintenance, insurance, monitoring, and repairs

label_i18n.fr: Coût annuel d'exploitation et de maintenance (USD)
label_i18n.es: Costo anual de operación y mantenimiento (USD)

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring costs for maintenance, insurance, monitoring, and repairs
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bakım, sigorta, izleme ve onarımlar için yinelenen maliyetler
businessContext_i18n.de: Wiederkehrende Kosten für Wartung, Versicherung, Überwachung und Reparaturen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts récurrents pour la maintenance, l'assurance, la surveillance et les réparations
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos recurrentes de mantenimiento, seguros, monitoreo y reparaciones
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكاليف المتكررة للصيانة والتأمين والمراقبة والإصلاحات.

inputs.label: Grid Electricity Price (USD/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Current or projected price of grid electricity, used to calculate savings

label_i18n.es: Precio de la electricidad de la red (USD/kWh)

businessContext_i18n.en: Current or projected price of grid electricity, used to calculate savings
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarrufları hesaplamak için kullanılan mevcut veya tahmini şebeke elektrik fiyatı
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller oder prognostizierter Strompreis aus dem Netz, zur Berechnung der Einsparungen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel ou projeté de l'électricité du réseau, utilisé pour calculer les économies
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio actual o proyectado de la electricidad de la red, utilizado para calcular ahorros
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر الحالي أو المتوقع لكهرباء الشبكة، يُستخدم لحساب التوفير.

inputs.label: Annual Inflation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate affecting future electricity prices and costs

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate affecting future electricity prices and costs
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki elektrik fiyatlarını ve maliyetleri etkileyen beklenen yıllık enflasyon oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Inflationsrate, die zukünftige Strompreise und Kosten beeinflusst
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel attendu affectant les prix futurs de l'électricité et les coûts
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual esperada que afecta los precios futuros de la electricidad y los costos
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التضخم السنوي المتوقع الذي يؤثر على أسعار الكهرباء والتكاليف المستقبلية.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti (WACC) veya gerekli getiri oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichteter durchschnittlicher Kapitalkostensatz (WACC) oder erforderliche Rendite
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pondéré du capital (CMPC) ou taux de rendement requis
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio ponderado del capital (WACC) o tasa de rendimiento requerida
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة المرجح لرأس المال (WACC) أو معدل العائد المطلوب.

inputs.label: System Lifetime (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational life of the renewable energy system

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational life of the renewable energy system
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yenilenebilir enerji sisteminin beklenen işletme ömrü
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de vie opérationnelle attendue du système d'énergie renouvelable
businessContext_i18n.es: Vida operativa esperada del sistema de energía renovable
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمر التشغيلي المتوقع لنظام الطاقة المتجددة.

rules.message: Annual energy output seems low for the given capacity. Check capacity factor assumptions.
Degradation rate exceeds typical industry standards (ISO 50006). Verify manufacturer data.
Discount rate out of reasonable range for renewable projects.
Incentive percentage unusually high; verify local regulations.

thresholds.alert: Negative NPV: Project may not be financially viable under current assumptions.
IRR below discount rate: Investment does not meet required return threshold.
Payback period exceeds 75% of system lifetime. High financial risk.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
